videos.title: Siberian Sprints and Pursuits
videos.description: Images of the medal winners at the IBU World Championships in Khanty Mansiysk.

videos.title: Nathan, Benedikt and Anton in Khanty
videos.transcript:
[Music]
three gentlemen on the podium today
Nathan Smith in first place Benedict do
of Germany in second and Anton chapulin
in
third Nathan is this better than that
silver medal at the World
Championships um I'd say it's about on
par it's my first win which is huge um
it's not quite as a surprise to me I
knew after World Champs that I could
fight for a Podium on a really good day
but uh I mean it's special to be to have
your first win I don't know even if it's
not World Champs it's still uh I don't
know it's
amazing what was going through your mind
when you came to that last standing
stage in the lead huge crowd oh I knew
there was a couple guys not far behind
um I've had times before where I think
in in erson I was in the top three and
then I missed three on the last standing
so so that went through my mind a little
bit but uh I kept my focus one miss I
think was pretty good for the conditions
and uh I was pretty relieved I'm not
going to lie when those guys missed a
little bit more than me there were you a
bit worried when you missed uh yeah I
thought if they had one or clean then it
would be a painful last
lap before a few weeks ago did you
expect to be a World Cup winner this
year um I think in nov Mesto in the
pursuit when I I went 20 for 20 I got
fifth uh that was a race where I knew it
was even though I didn't Podium there I
knew it was a Podium worthy race so uh
after January where I had a rough go in
nov Mesto I felt pretty strong since
then so I knew if I kept on the right
track that I think I could
Podium Benny your second Podium here
pretty excited
today of course um yeah
I didn't imagine Before the Race but um
I said okay I just want to do my job um
especially at the shooting
range um I had some luck at the prone
shooting so there was one shoot um
really nearby but um yeah
standing uh I felt not perfectly
sure um but um two times only one
mistakes and the last shooting I said
okay one mistake and I saw m and Anon in
the round and I said okay one round okay
so it will be the fourth fifth place and
then I made my round and went out and
saw um okay second place and I was so
excited and I gave everything and then I
thought okay maybe they will come from
from behind but um yeah I think they
looked for the third place and so I had
some luck and could um
make a save um last round and I was
really happy and yeah I didn't expect it
before were you still a bit nervous with
those two guys behind you thinking that
they could catch you yeah that's right
uh I was really really nervous um yeah
it's sometime it's difficult sometimes
it's um you see the others at the
shooting range and you really nervous
but today I could really um concentrate
to myself
and I think today that's was the the
receip for the um for the
result Anton did you feel like you were
maybe a little stronger than Marton
going into that last
loop I knew martan is a very strong
rival and I had the choice catch up with
Benedict try catching up with Benedict
because he's in a very good shape now
maybe save the power for the final rush
I understood there is no need to jerk
around
and I risked losing my strength and
decided to keep them for fighting for
out so it was quite cool that Russia is
on the podium okay the entire race was
not good too many penalties maybe I
should have run bit slow lower but I
believe I will take account of my
mistakes today and will work better
tomorrow how tough was it shooting out
there today it looked like the wind was
just really pushing the bullets to the
side indeed at the last range we had
very good wind so many rivals made
mistakes but I'm
happy I'm happy that
I did not make more mistake than forat
did because then I had the opportunity
to fight with him and I hope there will
be no such wind tomorrow at least it's
not going to interfere with me was it a
lot of fun with that huge crowd out
there in your home country today being
able to pull off that Podium
spot I like it very much performing H
especially when a lot of people have
come to support me my friends my
relatives people I know who have come to
the city to support me our team and of
course it's very pleasant that when
people are watching supporting worrying
about me today I felt that uh the last
lap I felt I must do my best because
they have come here and they must not
waste all the time standing in the
stadium congratul L and gentlemen

videos.title: Postcard from Siberia: Welcome to Khanty Mansiysk!
videos.description: A sunny day in Western Siberia and thoughts about the season about to end.
videos.transcript:
[Music]
nine times I was here in hunti and yeah

always nice to come
here uh nice nice tracks uh the weather
is is very good here uh the shooting
range is very hot the track I love the
track after the world championship it's
uh more friendly and uh I don't know the
atmosphere is more uh nice everybody's a
little bit TI and
uh me I'm also happy that it's finished
soon
so yeah I have won my world championship
title here 2011 so I think I will always
remember this but this also means a good
party in the end of the
season por thep and vka

videos.title: Selina Gasparin 6th in Mass Start
videos.description: Comments after mass start in Khanty Mansiysk
videos.transcript:
silly like aspirin must start last race
of the season here in countryman siska
sixth you're happy with you Ray so
disappointed not getting just a bit
closer to the podium oh no I'm really
happy with the sixth place for me it was
a really good race very good shooting it
was because my friend said I have to
drink a shot for every mistake so I was
afraid of Richard drunk so I did showed
really good and I did just enjoy the
last race of the season and I'm really
happy with this good result was it tough
other yeah I was really tough I was so
tired and I was really lucky that I had
always some back to ski behind and so
it's more easy for me well they are I
think everybody's tired now what's next
night for you uh next party tonight I
think it's one year ago I did the last
party here so it's going to be fun land
on holiday I was only thinking about
holiday all the race today so yeah I
think everybody is happy to be finishes
along nice and hard season enjoy your
